rune.runeenchanting.absorbing.descriptio: Chance to nullify damage that will be applied to the chestplate
rune.runeenchanting.adrenaline.descripti: Increases mining and attack speed the lower the tool's durability
rune.runeenchanting.air_affinity.descrip: Negates the mining speed penalty when off ground
rune.runeenchanting.air_stealer.descript: Steals air supply from the attacked entity
rune.runeenchanting.aqua_affinity.descri: Negates the mining speed penalty when underwater
rune.runeenchanting.atmospheric.descript: Gain mining speed under the sun, attack speed under the moon light, and reduced durability consumption in the rain
rune.runeenchanting.atmospheric.info: Current Bonus Mining Speed: +%s%%. Current Bonus Attack Speed: +%s%%. Current durability loss reduction: %s%
rune.runeenchanting.bane_of_hissing.desc: Increases damage dealt to hissing creatures
rune.runeenchanting.bane_of_noses.descri: Increases damage dealt to long nosed creatures
rune.runeenchanting.blast_protection.des: Reduces damage and knockback taken by explosions
rune.runeenchanting.blasting.description: Increases mining speed. The lower the explosion resistance of the block, the higher the mining speed
rune.runeenchanting.channeling.descripti: Summon a lightning bolt on entity or lightning rod hit
rune.runeenchanting.charged_jump.descrip: Crouch for a few seconds to charge up a strong jump
rune.runeenchanting.charged_jump.info: Time to full charge: %ss. Max jump boost: %s
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_binding.des: Prevents the item from being unequipped
Using the item can hurt the user
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_explosion.d: Attacks cause the attacker to explode after a delay
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_frenzy.desc: Buffs attackers with Speed, Resistance and Strength when hit
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_obscurity.d: Chance to become blind when hit
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_short_arm.d: Lowers entity and block interaction range
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_static_char: May attract lightning strikes during thunderstorms
Strike odds during thunderstorms: 1 in %s each second
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_the_void.de: Chance to destroy items mined / fished / dropped by mobs
rune.runeenchanting.curse_of_unstable_mo: Periodically randomizes movement speed between very slow, neutral, and very fast
rune.runeenchanting.depth_strider.descri: Reduces the movement speed reduction that occurs when in water
rune.runeenchanting.double_jump.descript: Press jump while in the air to jump again
rune.runeenchanting.dwarfing.description: Increases mining speed. The deeper you mine, the higher the mining speed
rune.runeenchanting.earthbend.descriptio: Increases mining speed for blocks that don't require a tool
rune.runeenchanting.explosive.descriptio: Attacks mark the target to explode after a delay
rune.runeenchanting.fire_guardian.descri: Gives fire resistance for a few seconds after taking fire damage, with a cooldown
rune.runeenchanting.fire_guardian.info: Cooldown: %s. Fire resistance: %ss. Cooldown on use: %ss
rune.runeenchanting.fire_protection.desc: Reduces damage taken by lava and fire and reduces time on fire
rune.runeenchanting.fire_surge.descripti: Increases damage dealt when on fire
rune.runeenchanting.flame.description: Sets the entity or arrows on fire
rune.runeenchanting.flame.info: Melee attack set on fire: %ss. Ranged attack: %ss
rune.runeenchanting.frost_walker.descrip: Create ice when walking near water
rune.runeenchanting.gravity_defying.desc: Arrows fly in a flat trajectory, gradually decelerating
rune.runeenchanting.impaling.description: Increases damage dealt to creatures touched by water or rain
rune.runeenchanting.infinity.description: Chance to not consume an arrow when using a bow
rune.runeenchanting.invulnerability.desc: Increases the time you're invulnerable after a hit
rune.runeenchanting.juicy_bait.descripti: Chance to fish 2 items instead of 1
rune.runeenchanting.knockback.descriptio: Increases knockback of weapons and arrows
rune.runeenchanting.loyalty.description: Return the trident to the owner
rune.runeenchanting.luck.description: Increases yield from blocks mined, entities killed and fishing
rune.runeenchanting.lure.description: Lowers the time it takes to lure fish
rune.runeenchanting.magic_protection.des: Reduces damage taken by magic attacks and decreases the duration of negative effects
rune.runeenchanting.melee_protection.des: Reduces damage taken by melee attacks and increases attack speed
rune.runeenchanting.multishot.descriptio: Load and shot 3 arrows at once
rune.runeenchanting.part_breaker.descrip: Drops extra items from special loot tables on kill
rune.runeenchanting.piercing.description: Arrows will pass through multiple entities
rune.runeenchanting.power.description: Increases damage dealt by the arrow
rune.runeenchanting.projectile_protectio: Reduces damage taken by projectiles and mobs sight
rune.runeenchanting.rage.description: Increases damage dealt based on missing health
rune.runeenchanting.reach.description: Increases entity and block interaction range
rune.runeenchanting.recovery.description: Recover some health back overtime when attacked
rune.runeenchanting.recovery.info: Stored healing: %s. Damage to regen: %s%%. Regen speed: %s/s
rune.runeenchanting.respiration.descript: Increases the time you can breathe underwater
rune.runeenchanting.retreat.description: Gain movement speed the less health you have
rune.runeenchanting.riptide.description: Throw yourself instead of the trident and deal damage on contact
rune.runeenchanting.smite.description: Increases damage dealt to undead creatures
rune.runeenchanting.soul_speed.descripti: Speed up walking on soul blocks
rune.runeenchanting.sprint_pact.descript: Increased movement speed but can no longer sprint
rune.runeenchanting.steady_fall.descript: Absorbs fall damage by consuming boot durability
rune.runeenchanting.sweeping_edge.descri: Increases damage dealt with sweep attack
rune.runeenchanting.tunneling.descriptio: Mines additional blocks in a column when mining
rune.runeenchanting.veining.description: Mines all connected blocks of the same type
rune.runeenchanting.vindication.descript: Stack damage taken and deal it back with the next attack
rune.runeenchanting.water_coolant.descri: Increases damage dealt to water sensitive creatures
